examples: She could not eat anything without feeling nauseated.
I nauseated about the food she cooked.
I have tried lately to read Shakespeare, and found it so intolerably dull that it nauseated me.
Already reeling from the flu, I grew more nauseated as I sloshed in the wind-whipped waves.
Nine years ago he woke up in the middle of the night, nauseated, dizzy--and completely deaf.
